source_text: Masako: We have to go, or we'll lose him.
Do you have news of your family's killers?
Because he is an ungrateful traitor.
After what happened at the inn, I didn't think you'd visit the temple again.
Yuna's brother is finally safe, but we had to split up after our escape.
I should make sure they reached the town of Komatsu Forge.
If Taka has had time to recover, he may be able to make me a tool to climb the walls of Castle Kaneda.
Find the monk before the bandits reach the bridge.
GO TO THE TOWN OF KOMATSU FORGE
